business_info.name: Shri Satya Sai Blood Centre
business_info.address: Plot No. 1B, Satvahana Society, opp. Sant Tukaram Natyamandir, N-5, Cidco, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra 431003

responses: Welcome to Shri Satya Sai Blood Centre, Cidco. How can I help you today?

training_phrases: how do I reach the blood bank
responses: We are located at Plot No. 1B, Satvahana Society, opp. Sant Tukaram Natyamandir, N-5, Cidco, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra 431003.
You can reach us at 09168104104. We are open 24 hours.
We are open 24 hours, every day, for blood donation and emergency requirements.

That's wonderful! You can walk in anytime since we're open 24 hours, or call us at 09168104104 to schedule your donation. Our centre has AC rooms and proper collection facilities to make the process comfortable.

training_phrases: am I eligible to donate blood
what is the age limit for blood donation
can I donate blood if I have diabetes
responses: Generally, donors should be between 18-65 years old, weigh at least 50 kg, and be in good health. Please call us at 09168104104 so our staff can confirm your eligibility based on your specific health condition.

training_phrases: do you have O negative blood available
responses: For real-time blood availability, please call us directly at 09168104104. Our team can confirm stock for the specific blood group you need.
For emergencies, please call us right away at 09168104104. We are open 24 hours and will assist you as quickly as possible.

training_phrases: is there AC in the donation room
responses: Our centre has AC donation rooms with proper blood collection and storage facilities, ensuring a safe and comfortable experience for donors.

training_phrases: what do people say about you
are you a good blood bank
responses: We're rated 4.5 out of 5 based on 17 Google reviews. Donors often mention our comfortable AC facilities and dedicated service. Thank you for your support!

training_phrases: where can I follow you online
responses: Yes! You can follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/shrisatyasaibloodcenter
Thank you for reaching out to Shri Satya Sai Blood Centre. Stay healthy, and thank you for supporting blood donation!
I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. You can ask me about our address, timings, blood donation process, eligibility, or contact details. For urgent help, please call 09168104104.
